title: stachys carlittensis
intro: Stachys carlittensis, also known as Corsican woundwort, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Corsica and Sardinia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Stachys carlittensis include its ability to reduce swelling, promote healing, and protect against infection. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
